The Farmer

The Farmer is a 3D farming simulator game where the player cultivates the field, sows the seeds, waters them and carries out pesticide operations with a tractor. It is a game where the players can perform every operation they can think of in the field of farming. It is also a realistic simulation game for those who want to enter this field in real life. Get in the seat of your tractor, take the necessary farm tools and head to your land in this virtual farming world!

Play The Farmer Online

Loading game...
About The Farmer

The Farmer is a 3D farming simulator game where the player cultivates the field, sows the seeds, waters them and carries out pesticide operations with a tractor. It is a game where the players can perform every operation they can think of in the field of farming. It is also a realistic simulation game for those who want to enter this field in real life. Get in the seat of your tractor, take the necessary farm tools and head to your land in this virtual farming world! This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load The Farmer in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Driving game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play The Farmer for free?

Yes. The Farmer is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install The Farmer?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
